notes: Recognizable as a squid in the photo's pose but the silhouette merges arms/tentacles into stubby blobs and lacks the distinctive long whip tentacles, eye, and clean FAO line discipline.
specific_issues: long whip tentacles from the photo are missing or truncated into short stubs
arms merge into a single mass with no individuated tapering points
eye reduced to a tiny dot rather than the prominent almond with pupil visible in the photo
fin outline is exaggerated/diamond-shaped rather than the gently rounded mantle fin in the photo
stipple is scattered randomly along edges instead of concentrated chromatophore field across the mantle
sucker rings only sparsely indicated on a couple of arms, not consistent ring pattern along all arms
outline has small bumpy artifacts suggesting photo-trace noise rather than clean single-weight ink
head/mantle junction poorly defined, no funnel detail
